message:
feat(core): add count_min_sketch module with property-based tests (ft-283h4.22)

Adds a Count-Min Sketch implementation for approximate frequency
estimation with O(1) insertion and O(d) query, providing guaranteed
upper-bound error.

count_min_sketch.rs:
- CmsConfig with configurable width (default 2048) and depth (default 5)
- Error guarantees: epsilon ~0.13%, delta ~0.67% at defaults
- Use cases: track frequent error types across 50+ panes, estimate
  command frequency distributions, detect hot panes by output rate

proptest_count_min_sketch.rs — property-based test coverage:
- Estimate upper bound: estimate(x) >= true_count(x) always
- Total count consistency, merge commutativity/additivity
- Clear idempotence, inner product symmetry
- Dimension mismatch rejection, serde roundtrips
- Monotonic estimates, clone equivalence, memory bounds

lib.rs: registers pub mod count_min_sketch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
